props.ChoiceText: You beached the longboat on an island where every ruin and footprint felt older than the tide.
props.ChoiceBio: A strange island landing taught you that not every shore wants to become a port.

0.TransitionText: Because a strange island landing taught you that not every shore wants to become a port, coasts and safe routes ceased to satisfy you.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Explorer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a strange island landing taught you that not every shore wants to become a port, tide, weather, and hazard remained the terms of your life.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Sailor, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a strange island landing taught you that not every shore wants to become a port, life on the water opened another dangerous road.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Occultist, but you may remain on your current path instead.
